aronui.when_to_use: Use when the user wants to schedule a meeting, add an appointment, or set a reminder.
aronui.output_shape: The created calendar event object, typically containing an event ID.

pitfalls.text: No probe attempts were provided; cannot quote exact errors. Required arguments are summary, start, end.

procedure: Ensure summary is a non-empty string.
Ensure start and end are valid ISO8601 or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM format.
Provide optional description, provider, account_id, calendar_id, reminder_minutes as needed.
verification: Check that the event is created in the specified calendar.
Verify the event details match the input.
